mapper.select: select tenant_id, id from batch.job_instance where instance_status in ('SUCCESS','PARTIAL_FAILED','FAILED','CANCELLED','TERMINATED') and finished_at is not null and finished_at < #{cutoff} order by tenant_id asc, id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into archive.job_instance_archive ( id, tenant_id, job_definition_id, trigger_request_id, job_code, instance_no, biz_date, trigger_type, instance_status, queue_code, worker_group, priority, dedup_key, version, expected_partition_count, success_partition_count, failed_partition_count, trace_id, params_snapshot, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, deadline_at, expected_duration_seconds, sla_alerted_at, batch_no, operator_id, rerun_flag, retry_flag, rerun_reason, related_file_id, parent_instance_id, result_summary, run_attempt, high_water_mark_in, high_water_mark_out, calendar_code, data_interval_start, data_interval_end, job_definition_version, rerun_policy_snapshot, replay_session_id, dry_run ) select id, tenant_id, job_definition_id, trigger_request_id, job_code, instance_no, biz_date, trigger_type, instance_status, queue_code, worker_group, priority, dedup_key, version, expected_partition_count, success_partition_count, failed_partition_count, trace_id, params_snapshot, started_at, finished_at, created_at, updated_at, deadline_at, expected_duration_seconds, sla_alerted_at, batch_no, operator_id, rerun_flag, retry_flag, rerun_reason, related_file_id, parent_instance_id, result_summary, run_attempt, high_water_mark_in, high_water_mark_out, calendar_code, data_interval_start, data_interval_end, job_definition_version, rerun_policy_snapshot, replay_session_id, dry_run from batch.job_instance where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id in #{id} on conflict (tenant_id, id) do nothing
insert into archive.job_partition_archive select * from batch.job_partition where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (tenant_id, id) do nothing
insert into archive.job_task_archive select * from batch.job_task where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (tenant_id, id) do nothing
insert into archive.job_step_instance_archive select * from batch.job_step_instance where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (tenant_id, id) do nothing
insert into archive.pipeline_instance_archive select * from batch.pipeline_instance where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and related_job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (tenant_id, id) do nothing
insert into archive.workflow_run_archive select * from batch.workflow_run where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and related_job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (tenant_id, id) do nothing
insert into archive.job_execution_log_archive select * from batch.job_execution_log where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (tenant_id, id) do nothing
insert into archive.compensation_command_archive select * from batch.compensation_command where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and related_job_instance_id in #{id} on conflict (tenant_id, id) do nothing
